title: Analects 12.22: Raise the Straight and Place Them Over the Crooked
description: The Confucian principle of governance: promote honest people and the dishonest will be reformed.
introduction: The Confucian principle of governance: promote honest people and the dishonest will be reformed.

translation.text: Raise the straight and place them over the crooked, and the crooked will be straightened.
